tweets.text: In 2019, @SecPompeo designated Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, including its Qods Force, as a Foreign Terrorist Organization – the first time part of a foreign government has been so designated. Details in the latest Country Reports on Terrorism: https://t.co/9d4KagNzOj

Deputy Secretary Biegun gave remarks at the Three Seas Initiative Virtual Ministerial hosted by Estonia. The U.S. and @DFCgov are investing up to $1 billion in #3SI and partnering with member states to boost economic prosperity via regional connectivity. https://t.co/AeL20m5MqL

Starting soon! @NMADmuseum will be co-hosting a program with the @AmRevMuseum to discuss the Declaration of Independence and what it meant to the global community. Watch live here https://t.co/68O9XUeorV. https://t.co/X5FgLZHprC

The United States joins the DRC in celebrating their 60th anniversary of independence. As we mark six decades of friendship between our countries, we affirm our commitment to our Privileged Partnership for Peace and Prosperity and to continue to fight COVID-19 and Ebola together.
.@SecPompeo delivers remarks on Iran and the expiring UN arms embargo during a public briefing of the United Nations Security Council. https://t.co/1RJrgx4hry

Lieutenant Colonel Karma Rigzin of Bhutan is being honored for her leadership in pioneering Bhutan’s victim-centered specialized national police unit on women and children that led to the first-ever criminal human trafficking case. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/ZaOv7pWReR

In celebration of Independence Day @NMADmuseum will co-host a program with @AmRevMuseum on June 30, 2020 at 1:00 PM EDT. Join them for a special diplomacy classroom event on the Declaration of Independence. https://t.co/68O9XUeorV https://t.co/GqJPtFyC49

With the Global @Coalition to Defeat ISIS, the United States completed the destruction of the so-called caliphate in Iraq and Syria. Read more in the latest Country Reports on Terrorism: https://t.co/9YKikLIE90

.@SecPompeo: Institutions should be rooted in democratic values and reflect the interests of all member states that created them. Just as in transatlantic settings, we should work together in multilateral settings to protect those good things from malign CCP influence. https://t.co/1FU2yPVAYR
.@SecPompeo: The United States is not forcing Europe to “choose” between the free world or China’s authoritarian vision. China is. https://t.co/49J44iYKLg

.@SecPompeo: We can develop our longstanding, deep, and fruitful relationship with the Chinese people, and distinguish their hopes and dreams from that of their Communist Party rulers. https://t.co/HmwjReN9NC

.@SecPompeo: America was founded on a promise: a promise to uphold unalienable rights of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. And the Trump administration’s work to end human trafficking is an important part of that noble tradition. https://t.co/iAd0FqzdGy

TIP Report Hero Sophie Otiende: I know being able to name the crime is empowering, and for someone like me, it gave me the language and tools to not only complete my healing process but to also begin to fight for other survivors like me who are in need of help. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/iSobD82xEt

.@IvankaTrump: The #TIPReport Heroes are from around the world and recognized by the U.S. Department of State for their tireless efforts to pursue justice for victims, prosecute traffickers, and educate the public about human trafficking trends in their countries and abroad. https://t.co/rv19v9Em4T
.@SecPompeo: We are undaunted in our pursuit of bringing terrorists to justice. https://t.co/uK6Isdrr2U
.@SecPompeo: We are undaunted in our pursuit of bringing terrorists to justice. https://t.co/gx5zt396IN

.@JTIP_State Ambassador Richmond: Today’s release marks a historic milestone in the fight to end trafficking around the world. The United States is committed to ending modern slavery. https://t.co/f8DchQMPfz https://t.co/RaGBvYmtvx

.@SecPompeo: We’re concerned by Beijing’s behavior. And we’re not the only ones. Our friends and partners are finding their voice and taking action to counter China’s malign activities. https://t.co/mb2EvsYqfb

Deputy Secretary Biegun: The U.S. is pleased to celebrate the 20th Anniversary of the Community of Democracies. Guided by our vision and our values, the United States stands with you in supporting human progress anchored in democratic principles. https://t.co/Am5jVb2doq https://t.co/XX8qpZrycb
.@SecPompeo: We will continue to support the National Assembly, Interim President @JGuaido, and the Venezuelan people in their quest to restore democracy. https://t.co/IbLogSnCOf

.@SecPompeo: The U.S. will keep speaking up for the Chinese people. Last week CCP authorities sentenced human rights lawyer Yu Wensheng to four years in prison. We continue to call for the release those unjustly imprisoned in China. https://t.co/EMmzd1JjLm

The Chinese Communist Party exploits its citizens’ access to U.S. research institutions, academia & private firms to build the People's Liberation Army's military systems, exert pressure on its neighbors & maintain its grip on power. https://t.co/ySPgrulssx #MilitaryCivilFusion https://t.co/WUQo3NC9Ju

NSA O'Brien: "The Chinese Communist Party seeks total control over the people's lives. This means economic control, it means political control, it means physical control, and perhaps, most importantly it means, thought control." https://t.co/eGnk1V5tki
NSA O'Brien: Over the past decade, the [Chinese Communist Party] invested billions of dollars in overseas propaganda operations. https://t.co/wWdHO0Laci

Oxana Alistratova of Moldova is being honored for her relentless resolve to achieve positive outcomes for survivors. Through her NGO, Interaction, Alistratova played a key role in convincing local authorities of the need to adopt laws to prevent human trafficking. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/pMf1iBGImg

Maxwell Matewere of Malawi is being honored for his tireless dedication to improving Malawi’s anti-trafficking response. He was the driving force behind the passage of the 2015 Trafficking in Persons Act and continues to advocate for its full implementation. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/FFtz5fra9y

Lāsma Stabiņa of Latvia, Latvia’s National Trafficking in Persons Coordinator, is being honored for her leadership in international projects and her dedication to expanding the country’s partnerships and networks worldwide to prevent human trafficking. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/m3RqABf7V1

Sophie Otiende of Kenya is being honored for her leadership role in the development of victim assistance infrastructure, resources, and practices. With her expertise, Otiende set up systems for the first shelter exclusively for victims of trafficking in Kenya. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/65GjQg7WnJ

Reda Shoukr of Egypt is being honored for her exceptional efforts to empower human trafficking survivors. Through her organization, she helps survivors and vulnerable individuals transition from a life of exploitation by providing legal aid and social services. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/7reFf3kRPD

Patricia Ho of Hong Kong is being honored for her leadership in defending the rights of human trafficking victims and marginalized groups. Ho raised awareness of the dire need for a human trafficking law in Hong Kong and uplifts survivors' voices in her advocacy. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/9y6XGD6hTb

Ary Varela and Natalino Correia of Cabo Verde are being honored for their pursuit of human trafficking cases within the country. Their leadership and diligence throughout the investigation of Cabo Verde’s first successful forced labor prosecution was essential. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/spj6RF4yfY

Lieutenant Colonel Karma Rigzin of Bhutan is being honored for her leadership in pioneering Bhutan’s victim-centered specialized national police unit on women and children that led to the first-ever criminal human trafficking case. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/89mcGW4Mfu

Nina Balabayeva of Kazakhstan is being honored for her enormous achievement in building the country’s first human trafficking shelter. She has dedicated her life and career to combating trafficking in persons even before there were laws on the books in Kazakhstan. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/t7YHDHFXFS

Today, @JTIP_State released the annual Trafficking in Persons Report. This year’s TIP Report celebrates 20 years of progress and paves the way for advancement in the fight to #EndTrafficking. https://t.co/MOQQc1yZHQ

.@SecPompeo: We’re releasing our annual Country Reports on Terrorism. I hope everyone sees that this Administration has taken on terrorist threats that other administrations downplayed. We are undaunted in our pursuit of bringing terrorists to justice. https://t.co/V8ivgGY76y

.@SecPompeo honors this year’s #TIPReportHeroes. These courageous leaders have dedicated their lives to protecting victims, punishing traffickers, and preventing human trafficking. Watch the ceremony live on June 25 at 2:00 PM EDT. https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz https://t.co/R2gicIenSH

This year’s Trafficking in Persons Report highlights governments that have failed to fulfill their commitments to protect victims, and instead are acting as traffickers themselves. Watch the release of the #TIPReport June 25 at 2:00 PM EDT. https://t.co/T9DBimTZYn https://t.co/ONzA7UoTCn

The U.S.-ROK alliance was formed during the Korean War and remains ironclad in the defense of peace and security in the Indo-Pacific. We honor those in both countries for their bravery and sacrifice, as we remember freedom is not free. https://t.co/2sx4i90TRx #KoreanWar70Years

Today, on the 70th anniversary of the Korean War, we remember and honor all those from the United States, the Republic of Korea, and the other countries under UN Command who laid down their lives in the name of freedom and democracy. #KoreanWar70Years https://t.co/bUspNhntsH
.@SecPompeo: We are undaunted in our pursuit of bringing terrorists to justice. https://t.co/HAdAe0DAZX

.@SecPompeo: Without action by the UNSC before Oct. 18, Iran will be able to purchase advanced weapons, becoming the arms dealer of choice for terrorists and rogue states. The legal options are clear, but our great preference is to simply have the Council renew the arms embargo. https://t.co/jB32aGyo0a

.@SecPompeo: As the country begins to reopen, the Department is getting our passport team back on the field. In the coming weeks, they will tackle applications that were put on hold because of the pandemic and provide the fast and efficient service Americans rightfully expect. https://t.co/Jcl2X8gV0s

.@SecPompeo: The best pathway out of the Venezuelan crisis is through a broadly acceptable transitional government to administer free and fair presidential and parliamentary elections. We will continue to support the National Assembly, @jguaido, and the Venezuelan people. https://t.co/VNsKKiCrEM

At this very moment, human traffickers are robbing 25 million people of their freedom and basic human dignity. This is a global epidemic. It is our collective responsibility to extinguish human trafficking wherever it exists. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/hLSNG0xK6K

.@SecPompeo: Democracy isn't fragile. Democracy is strong. We defeated fascism and won the Cold War. It is authoritarianism that is fragile. Chinese Communist Party propagandists work hard to control information flows and speech to maintain their grip on power. https://t.co/UJKCYzYFIT

.@StateDeptCT released the annual Country Reports on Terrorism, detailing key developments in 2019 in the global fight against ISIS, al-Qa'ida, Iranian proxies, and other international terrorist groups. Read more: https://t.co/8zp8ZabXxB

President @realDonaldTrump: Protecting the innovations, creations, and inventions that power our country is vital to our economic prosperity and national security. https://t.co/QN60M8B8ZW #MilitaryCivilFusion https://t.co/6BSjCVhbTk

.@JTIP_State Ambassador Richmond: This is the time to engage. We are not powerless to do something about human trafficking. I believe that research can actually generate hope. https://t.co/LzEeBvvdFb https://t.co/ewfLUSDCLn
.@SecPompeo: Democracy is the only system of government that honors human dignity and personal freedom and progress for mankind. https://t.co/WPlpNDNje5
.@SecPompeo on upcoming elections in Hong Kong: We should all watch very closely whether those elections are permitted to take place in a free and fair fashion. https://t.co/Vhe25SAbYw

.@SecPompeo discusses the Chinese Communist Party's national security legislation in Hong Kong, its ongoing campaign of repression against Chinese Muslims, its recent escalation of border tensions with India, and its militarization of the South China Sea. https://t.co/xAauMfBiiu

.@SecPompeo: I hope that the Chinese Communist Party will begin to recognize that if they want to rise, if they want to continue to build out their nation, that they need to do so on a Western rule set that honors the rule of law and honors freedom and respect for sovereignty. https://t.co/zhOzYvsFkW

President @realDonaldTrump: Though we may all come from different places and different backgrounds, we’re united by our desire to ensure peace and dignity and equality for all Americans. https://t.co/G97Zw30Ykd

.@SecPompeo: I know that there’s fear in Europe that the United States wants you to choose between us and China. That’s simply not the case. It’s the Chinese Communist Party that’s forcing the choice. https://t.co/gDF9ApdPoJ

.@SecPompeo: We must take off the golden blinders of economic ties and see that the China challenge isn't just at the gates. Europe faces a China challenge, just as the United States does, and just as our South American, African, Middle Eastern, and Asian friends do. https://t.co/SScZHIttuu

.@SecPompeo: Never forget that while we see a united face from the Chinese Communist Party, that billion and a half people also have ideas that are different and they will be watching how this transpires as well. https://t.co/jKdGlfrmjn

.@SecPompeo discusses the positive steps that the United States and its allies are taking in order to counter the Chinese Communist Party's challenge to democracies around the world. https://t.co/gcHUdna06A

.@SecPompeo: We must take off the golden blinders of economic ties and see that the China challenge isn't just at the gates. Europe faces a China challenge, just as the United States does, and just as our South American, African, Middle Eastern, and Asian friends do. https://t.co/sVA88O7kJJ
President @realDonaldTrump: Americans can achieve anything when we work together as one national family. https://t.co/RW2QvJGyaU

.@SecPompeo: Russia must end its repression of those who oppose its occupation, release unjustly imprisoned Ukrainians, and return full control of the Peninsula to Ukraine. Crimea is Ukraine. https://t.co/xEv28R6l4G

Today on Father’s Day we celebrate all the father figures who bring strength, joy, and kindness to our world. We are grateful for their sacrifices to combat COVID-19 and unwavering support for family, friends, and community. Happy Father’s Day. https://t.co/rV69EmKxtg

More than five million Venezuelan refugees and migrants have fled their homes to escape Maduro's tyranny. The U.S. will not forget them, providing nearly $611M in humanitarian assistance since 2017. On #WorldRefugeeDay, we must do more together to address the growing crisis. https://t.co/yw5vCZoFlO

In the face of unprecedented forced displacement this #WorldRefugeeDay, the United States leads the way with lifesaving humanitarian assistance, including nearly $1.7B for @Refugees last year. https://t.co/4UsqW3IIt9 https://t.co/cbgwXFP0pg

On June 19, 1865, the enslaved African Americans of Galveston, Texas received word of their freedom, more than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation was issued. Today, we recognize #Juneteenth as a milestone on our journey and recommit to build a freer, stronger country. https://t.co/AtQgGkzV8s
President @realDonaldTrump: We are one nation. We grieve together, and we heal together. https://t.co/l67XMCsTjn
The United States and its G-7 partners strongly urge the PRC Government to re-consider this decision. https://t.co/UB9GavRDiJ

The PRC's decision does not conform with its international commitments under the principles of the legally binding, UN-registered Sino-British Joint Declaration. The national security law also risks undermining the One Country, Two Systems principle and Hong Kong's autonomy.

The United States, Canada, France, Germany, Italy, Japan, the United Kingdom, and the High Representative of the European Union issued a joint statement reiterating grave concern regarding the PRC's decision to impose a national security law on Hong Kong.
.@SecPompeo delivered the keynote address at the Copenhagen Democracy Summit 2020. https://t.co/Tb0LNdoFXo

.@JTIP_State Ambassador Richmond: They want to maximize their illegal profits by minimizing their victims’ freedom. Traffickers trade others’ freedom for their personal gain. https://t.co/LzEeBvvdFb https://t.co/uTSP13t0wA

Atlantic hurricane season began on June 1. The Department continues to advise U.S. citizens to avoid international travel due to the global impact of COVID-19, but if you travel during hurricane season, please review @TravelGov’s guidance. https://t.co/gK0bTmwsCA https://t.co/cg6oP5vIUa

.@SecPompeo: We stand for moral clarity. We stand for sovereignty. We stand for our citizenry. https://t.co/vlTcmaTrXo https://t.co/C61JdhGDeH

.@SecPompeo: We cannot allow ICC officials and their families come to the U.S. to shop, travel, and otherwise enjoy American freedoms as these same officials seek to prosecute the defenders of those freedoms. https://t.co/Ww31JNwhF5
.@SecPompeo: We cannot – and will not – stand idly by as our people are threatened by a kangaroo court [The ICC]. https://t.co/vlTcmaBR5Q https://t.co/W6nHVGEliA

.@SecPompeo: When our own people do wrong, we lawfully punish those individuals, rare as they are, who tarnish the reputation of our great U.S. military and intelligence services. We hold our own accountable better than the ICC has done for the worst perpetrators. https://t.co/4q5v735sWB
.@SecPompeo: We cannot – and will not – stand idly by as our people are threatened by a kangaroo court [The ICC]. https://t.co/vlTcmaBR5Q https://t.co/mYwFdTZHF0

.@SecPompeo: Given Israel’s robust civilian and military legal system, and strong track record of investigating and prosecuting wrongdoing by military personnel, it’s clear the ICC is only putting Israel in its crosshairs for nakedly political reasons. It’s a mockery of justice. https://t.co/WSKNHakQzH

Our goal is to provide the best possible customer service to the American people while maintaining a safe workplace. We are committed to processing applications as quickly as possible, as soon as it is safe for us to do so.

The Department looks forward to resuming routine passport processing, while protecting the safety of both our staff and our customers. We are working to resume normal operations in phases. Each passport agency will open based on local conditions.
